title: Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups * African American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups * African American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SELF ENHANCEMENT INC SELF ENHANCEMENT INC COMMUNITY & FAMILY PROGRAMS ANTI DOMESTIC AND SEXUAL VIOLENCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers safe and confidential services to survivors of domestic and sexual violence including advocacy, case management, support groups, safety planning, relocation assistance, emergency, medical and judicial accompaniments, and referrals to other resources. 310 NE Failing Street Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week. Calls placed outside of Monday-Friday 9am-5pm and holidays are forwarded to Call to Safety.
